description_long: This is a rectangular cardboard box of Cora 6 Cheeseburgers, featuring a vibrant orange and yellow color scheme. The front of the box displays two cheeseburgers with sesame seed buns, lettuce, cheese, and a patty, set against a yellow background with green lettuce accents. The brand name 'Cora' is prominently displayed in a white and red circle, and the product name '6 Cheeseburgers' is written in bold white text. The sides of the box are solid orange with white text, including branding and product information, while the back and bottom are plain with minimal design. The box appears sealed and is designed for retail sale, likely containing individually wrapped cheeseburgers inside.
description: A rectangular orange box of Cora 6 Cheeseburgers, featuring images of cheeseburgers with sesame seed buns, lettuce, and cheese on the front. The packaging is bright and retail-ready, with clear branding and product details.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main product branding, images of two cheeseburgers, and all key product information.
description_view_1: The left side view displays a solid orange panel with white text, including the brand and a barcode.
description_view_2: The top view is mostly plain with a small orange strip containing the product name and brand.
description_view_3: The right side view features the product name and brand in white text on an orange background.
attribute_topping_arrangement: Lettuce is placed beneath a slice of cheese, which sits atop the hamburger patty, all enclosed within a sesame seed bun. The toppings are neatly layered and evenly distributed.
